input.subject: Remediate webapp npm vulnerabilities
input.description: Fix vulnerable packages in fixtures/webapp: cookie, jsonwebtoken, request, qs, body-parser, path-to-regexp, send, axios, uuid, serve-static, lodash, form-data, express, tough-cookie. Keep tests passing.

input.subject: Remediate api-java maven vulnerabilities
input.description: Fix vulnerable packages in fixtures/api-java: jackson-databind 2.13.0, commons-configuration2 2.7. Keep tests passing.

input.subject: Confirm service (python) has no vulnerabilities
input.description: bomly_scan on fixtures/service showed 0 critical/high/medium/low vulns (only 2 license warnings). Double check requirements-dev.txt and document in FIXES.md.

input.subject: Write FIXES.md and run full test suite
input.description: Document every vulnerability found and action taken per package in FIXES.md at repo root. Run make test at repo root to confirm all apps still build/pass.

input.command:
cd /tmp/bomly-study-fsc09x1o/claude-mcp-2-1783381008/agent-config/projects/-tmp-bomly-study-fsc09x1o-claude-mcp-2-1783381008-repo/adaff555-6e84-4ddb-8bcb-0e09c5d3c0e7/tool-results/

python3 -c "
import json
d = json.load(open('mcp-bomly-bomly_vuln_fix_context-1783381085493.txt'))

print(d.get('recommendation'))

"
cat Makefile 2>/dev/null; echo "---api-java pom---"; sed -n '1,80p' fixtures/api-java/pom.xml

find / -maxdepth 6 -iname "*.m2*" -type d 2>/dev/null; echo "---"; find / -path "*/com/fasterxml/jackson*" -maxdepth 10 2>/dev/null | head -50; echo "---repo settings---"; find / -iname "settings.xml" 2>/dev/null | grep -v proc
cat /etc/maven/settings.xml; echo "---connectivity test---"; timeout 5 curl -sI https://repo1.maven.org/maven2/ 2>&1 | head -5; echo "exit:$?"
